title: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Banks On Brand Strength Amid Inflation
text: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) benefits from continued strength in the Packaged Beverages segment, strong market share gains and robust pricing actions. However, rising inflation is concerning.

title: Branch Chain Amino Acid (BCAA) Market is Expected to Surpass USD 498.49 Billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 4.4% from 2022 to 2030; Increasing Awareness of the Health Advantages of BCAAs and Demand For Sports Nutrition Products

title: Mondelez International Now Owns 3.24% of Keurig Dr Pepper
text: Fintel reports that Mondelez International has filed a 13D/A form with the SEC disclosing ownership of 45.54MM shares of Keurig Dr Pepper Inc (KDP).
